features.evidence: We have been using it for couple months now and no battery issues or overheating. Don't forget about the battery life and connectivity, as it is unlocked and it lasts a good 9 hours since it's opened, and it comes in a pretty good price deal too!
value: average battery life talk time: 23 Hours

features.evidence: This phone arrived on time, and in perfect condition without the "new" price. At a very reasonable price.

When I got the phone, it got to work and automatically updated it's software to the latest versions all the way up to One UI 7 and android 15. I really like the direction samsung is taking their software experience.
Phone works perfect very minimal screen scratches. Not even a single blemish or anything printed on the screen.
value: display pixel density: 416 Pixels Per Inch (PPI)

features.evidence: and the fact that the battery does take a little longer to charge from whats to be expected of a typical samsung 24 charging speed.

value: rear facing camera photo sensor resolution: 50 MP

features.evidence: 7+ years of updates may sound like a lot to some people or even excessive, it is perfect for people like I and many others who rely on used or refurbished phones.
